§6Decorative Blocks§f:
The §6Decorative Blocks §fare a §efamily of §6AE2-themed §f§bbuilding blocks§f. They are §6decorative §f only — they do not provide §6channels§f, §6power §f, or §6storage §f function.

§6Decorative Block Family§f:
- §bCertus Quartz Block §f(appliedenergistics2:quartz_block) — standard §6Certus Quartz §f block
- §bPure Certus Quartz Block §f(appliedenergistics2:quartz_block) — pure variant
- §bChiseled Certus Quartz Block §f(appliedenergistics2:chiseled_quartz_block) — decorative variant
- §bCertus Quartz Pillar §f(appliedenergistics2:quartz_pillar) — pillar variant
- §bFluix Block §f(appliedenergistics2:fluix_block) — §6glowing §fFluix block
- §bSky Stone Block §f(appliedenergistics2:sky_stone_block) — §6meteorite §f block
- §bSmooth Sky Stone Block §f(appliedenergistics2:smooth_sky_stone_block) — smoothed variant
- §bSky Stone Brick §f, §6Small Brick §f, §6Slab §f, §6Stairs §f variants
- §bSlabs §f and §6Stairs §f of all blocks

§6Production Path (decorative/certus_quartz_block.json)§f:
The §6Certus Quartz Block §frecipe is:
- §6Certus Quartz Crystal §f(appliedenergistics2:material:2 or any crystal in the §6#crystalCertusQuartz §foredict) — 4 (2x2)
- Yields 1× Certus Quartz Block

The §6Pure Certus Quartz Block §frecipe (decorative/certus_quartz_block_pure.json) is:
- §6Pure Certus Quartz Crystal §f(appliedenergistics2:material:10) — 4
- Yields 1× Pure Certus Quartz Block

The §6Fluix Block §frecipe (decorative/fluix_block.json) is:
- §6Fluix Crystal §f(appliedenergistics2:material:7) — 4
- Yields 1× Fluix Block (emits light)

The §6Certus Quartz Pillar §frecipe (decorative/certus_quartz_pillar.json) is:
- §6Certus Quartz Block §f — 2 (vertical)
- Yields 2× Certus Quartz Pillar

§6Function§f:
- §bBuilding §f: all decorative blocks can be used for §6construction §f
- §bLight §f: the §6Fluix Block §f emits §blight level 7 §f when §6powered §f
- §bSlabs/Steps §f: half-blocks for §6sloped §f and §6terraced §f builds
- §bStairs §f: standard §6stairs §f for §barchitectural §f detail

§6Direct Descendants (TaskRetrieval graph)§f:
The jei-graph shows 1 item the Certus Quartz Block is a component of:
- §6Certus Quartz Pillar §f (made from §6Certus Quartz Block §f)

§6Practical Use§f:
- §eTip§f: the §6Fluix Block §f is a §6great light source §f; pair with a §6redstone clock §f for a §6pulse-light §f effect
- §eTip§f: use §6Certus Quartz Pillar §f and §6Smooth Sky Stone §f for a §bclassic §fAE2 aesthetic
- §eTip§f: the §6deconstruction_*.json §f recipes in §6misc/ §f let you break down §6decorative blocks §f back into §6raw materials §f
- §cWarning§f: §6Sky Stone §f is §6unobtainable §f in survival without a §6Meteorite §f — it is rare
- §cWarning§f: §6Sky Stone §f is required to build a §6meteorite compass §f and access §6Charged Certus Quartz Ore §f
